variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription ID.
(Required) Name of the Azure resource group.
(Required) Name of the Azure Quantum workspace.

request.description: Gets a URL with SAS token for a container/blob in the storage account associated with the workspace. Starting with version 2026-01-15-preview, when used for a container the container is also created if it does not already exist. The SAS URL can be used to upload job input and/or download job output.

response.name: The request has succeeded.
